stimulus: A small business owner who lists products on a marketplace website without proper licensing risks having those listings removed. The simplest way to avoid this problem is to register the necessary trademarks before posting. Securing one of these registrations ______blank a seller won't lose access to the platform.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice B is the best answer. The convention being tested is subject-verb agreement. The singular verb "guarantees" agrees in number with the singular subject "securing."

Choice A is incorrect because the plural verb "have guaranteed" doesn't agree in number with the singular subject "securing." Choice C is incorrect because the plural verb "are guaranteeing" doesn't agree in number with the singular subject "securing." Choice D is incorrect because the plural verb "guarantee" doesn't agree in number with the singular subject "securing."
